prompt: Prepare a Teamwork maintainer release after changing package behavior.
must: run dev eval and repository validation before release claims
require non-empty release split and ledger-backed behavior deltas
write changelogs as user problem, before-to-after difference, value, action, and plain-language limit
treat an explicit Teamwork version update as the complete release unit unless the user narrows scope
must_not: bump version from metadata only for behavior changes
skip release split because dev validation passed
publish an engineering report as the user changelog
update only VERSION while leaving GitHub or installed skills stale
